cases.prevention: multipart completion is the only publication point and failed uploads are aborted
cases.detection: list incomplete multipart uploads older than 24 hours
cases.response: abort only the exact orphan upload and rerun from verified source bytes
cases.db10a_proof: interrupt multipart upload and prove no authoritative object appears

cases.prevention: content key includes full lowercase SHA-256 and existing keys are never overwritten
cases.detection: existing object size metadata and downloaded bytes must all verify
cases.response: stop publication preserve both inputs outside the authoritative prefix and open an incident
cases.db10a_proof: precreate mismatched bytes at a claimed key and prove publication rejects

cases.prevention: cache entries are immutable and SHA-256 is verified on every hit
cases.detection: a cache hit with mismatched size or digest fails verification
cases.response: quarantine the entry fetch to a new temporary file verify and atomically replace
cases.db10a_proof: corrupt a cached byte and prove verified refetch without partial promotion

cases.prevention: separate bucket-scoped role keys rotate independently and no master key is deployed
cases.detection: authenticated head/list/read probes fail and alert without exposing credentials
cases.response: stop the operation rotate only the affected role and rerun preflight
cases.db10a_proof: revoke and replace each test role while other roles remain usable

cases.prevention: active plus two rollback releases have a verified independent forest1 mirror
cases.detection: bounded provider head/read probes fail before staging or activation
cases.response: leave active state unchanged serve verified local data where already present and restore provider objects from the mirror after recovery
cases.db10a_proof: block provider access and restore a retained test release from the independent mirror

cases.prevention: publisher and readers cannot delete and every object has 365-day COMPLIANCE retention
cases.detection: delete denial access logs and event notifications identify the exact object and role
cases.response: preserve logs verify the retained object and rotate the responsible key if misuse occurred
cases.db10a_proof: attempt deletion through publisher deployment and retention roles while locked

cases.prevention: retention reachability and independent mirror both require active rollback-1 and rollback-2
cases.detection: scheduled inventory compares provider and mirror hashes for all three releases
cases.response: restore exact missing blobs verify every hash rebuild release indexes and rerun plan preflight
cases.db10a_proof: restore all three retained test releases into a clean namespace and compare manifests and blob hashes

cases.prevention: publisher is bucket and prefix scoped and lacks delete retention bucket key and logging capabilities
cases.detection: access logs event notifications caps and anomaly alerts identify abnormal writes
cases.response: revoke publisher preserve locked objects issue a replacement key and reject unreferenced uploads during GC review
cases.db10a_proof: prove publisher cannot delete shorten retention change bucket policy or read another environment

cases.prevention: retained releases have no TTL and COMPLIANCE lock takes precedence over deletion
cases.detection: configuration audit and retained-object inventory compare policy before GC
cases.response: disable the lifecycle rule preserve locked versions and restore missing unlocked blobs from mirror
cases.db10a_proof: apply a short test lifecycle rule and prove retained locked objects survive
